summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT has a live YELLOW triangle driven by ValueTrackers ratio_tr (b/a) and gamma_tr (included angle), with a scaled GREEN similar copy above. RIGHT has the (b/a, γ) moduli plane with a GREY cloud of 36 sample classes and a RED tracked dot. 5-config tour sweeps through (1, π/2), (0.4, 2π/5), (0.9, π/6), (0.6, 5π/6), (0.7, π/3).
